en-us.html:
So close to the enemy that they become your friend...

Story

393 AC - See through the eyes of someone else and try to understand. That's what you told me to do. I remember you set me on your lap when I came home from school and asked me what was wrong. I said that it was Hossam again, that he had pushed me and pulled my hair. And as usual, I had reacted badly and flipped out, so that the teacher had asked for a meeting with my parents to sort it all out. You asked me what he had done and you said that maybe he just wanted to get my attention. I followed your advice and tried to understand, and I saw that you were right. A few days later, we were inseparable…

I close my eyes and open my mind to Halua. I'm with him, in him, as he flies over the Thessalian Quadrant. I still feel his distress, while he feels my presence. Little by little, his memories come to me. And mine rise to the surface of his mind, like bubbles that then burst and release impressions, vague recollections that become clearer as the days go by. He had lived and grown among humans. He was initially treated kindly, almost with reverence, before being chased away when he became a burden. He was a protector, and he'd been stripped of his purpose, his job, his role. I was now seeing through his eyes, and I was starting to understand…

Narrator

SOLEDAD

blocks.text: So close to the enemy that they become your friend...

blocks.title: Story
paragraphs: 393 AC - See through the eyes of someone else and try to understand. That's what you told me to do. I remember you set me on your lap when I came home from school and asked me what was wrong. I said that it was Hossam again, that he had pushed me and pulled my hair. And as usual, I had reacted badly and flipped out, so that the teacher had asked for a meeting with my parents to sort it all out. You asked me what he had done and you said that maybe he just wanted to get my attention. I followed your advice and tried to understand, and I saw that you were right. A few days later, we were inseparable…

I close my eyes and open my mind to Halua. I'm with him, in him, as he flies over the Thessalian Quadrant. I still feel his distress, while he feels my presence. Little by little, his memories come to me. And mine rise to the surface of his mind, like bubbles that then burst and release impressions, vague recollections that become clearer as the days go by. He had lived and grown among humans. He was initially treated kindly, almost with reverence, before being chased away when he became a burden. He was a protector, and he'd been stripped of his purpose, his job, his role. I was now seeing through his eyes, and I was starting to understand…

fr-fr.html:
Si proche de son adversaire qu'elle en devint son amie...

Histoire

393 AC - Voir à travers les yeux de quelqu'un d'autre et essayer de comprendre. C'est ce que tu me disais de faire. Je me souviens que tu m'avais prise sur tes genoux quand j'étais rentrée de l'école, pour me demander ce qui n'allait pas. Je t'avais répondu que c'était encore Hossam qui m'avait embêtée, en me poussant, en me tirant les cheveux. Et comme d'habitude, j'étais partie au quart de tour, au point que la maîtresse avait pris rendez-vous avec papa et maman pour régler la situation. Tu m'avais demandé ce qu'il avait fait, et tu m'avais dit qu'il essayait peut-être d'attirer mon attention. J'avais suivi tes conseils et essayé de le comprendre, et vu que tu avais raison. Quelques jours plus tard, on était devenus inséparables...

Je ferme les yeux et m'ouvre à Halua. Je suis avec lui, en lui, alors qu'il survole les étendues du Quadrant Thessalien. Je sens encore son trouble, tandis qu'il sent ma présence. Petit à petit, ses souvenirs entrent en moi. Et les miens affleurent dans son esprit, comme des bulles qui, en éclatant, relâchent des impressions, des réminiscences diffuses qui gagnent en clarté au fil des jours. Il avait vécu et grandi parmi les humains. On l'avait traité d'abord avec bienveillance, et presque vénéré, avant de le chasser quand il était devenu gênant. Il était un protecteur, et on l'avait dépouillé de sa raison d'être, de sa charge, de sa fonction. Désormais, je voyais à travers ses yeux, et j'avais commencé à comprendre...

Narré par

SOLEDAD

blocks.text: Si proche de son adversaire qu'elle en devint son amie...

blocks.title: Histoire
